signatures.reason: PWA Kit crash page rendered — component threw without local ErrorBoundary. The upstream dev code is missing error handling, not an env issue.
React ErrorBoundary caught a component crash — upstream dev code threw during render.

signatures.error_snippet: React will try to recreate this component tree
signatures.reason: React component tree crashed and is being recreated — upstream dev code threw during render.
Playwright strict mode: locator matched multiple DOM elements. Test selector is too broad — use a more specific locator.
Playwright locator matched multiple elements (strict mode violation). Narrow the selector to match exactly one element.
Playwright timeout waiting for element. Likely a bad locator, race condition, or incorrect test assertion — not an app crash.

signatures.error_snippet: TypeError: undefined is not an object
signatures.reason: Component accessing undefined property — upstream dev code is missing null guard or ErrorBoundary around base-template component.
Component accessing property of undefined/null — upstream dev code is missing defensive checks or ErrorBoundary.
DNS resolution failure — transient network/infrastructure issue, not a code bug.
Connection refused — dev server or external service not reachable. Transient infrastructure issue.
Network connection timed out — transient infrastructure issue, not a code bug.
